# assessmentStatus

**Instance Property**

A value that indicates whether a learner has passed, failed, or not yet finished the task on a page.

## Declaration

```swift
var assessmentStatus: PlaygroundPage.AssessmentStatus? { get set }
```

## Assessing Progress

- **PlaygroundPage.AssessmentStatus**: The values you use to communicate whether a learner has passed, failed, or not yet finished the task on a page.
